name: Pending Fees Report
query:
SELECT
    s.name AS "Student:Link/Student:150",
    s.student_name AS "Student Name:Data:200",
    s.total_fee AS "Total Fee:Currency:120",

    IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(fp.amount_paid)
        FROM `tabFee Payment` fp
        WHERE fp.student = s.name AND fp.docstatus = 1
    ), 0) AS "Paid:Currency:120",

    (s.total_fee - IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(fp.amount_paid)
        FROM `tabFee Payment` fp
        WHERE fp.student = s.name AND fp.docstatus = 1
    ), 0)) AS "Pending:Currency:120"

FROM `tabStudent` s
